sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Rotate to horizontal
action(['SPACE'])

seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ('W', 'N', 'G', 'R'):
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"{n['color']}: rows [{min(rows)}, {max(rows)}], cols [{min(cols)}, {max(cols)}], pixels={n['pixels']}")
print(f"Done: {last_action_result.get('done')}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
